# FFERR_DEVICEPAUSED | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFERR_DEVICEPAUSED ](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_devicepaused)

-  FFERR_DEVICEPAUSED 

Global Variable# FFERR_DEVICEPAUSED

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_DEVICEPAUSED: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_devicepaused#Discussion)

When the device is paused via a call to FFDeviceSendForceFeedbackCommand(), other operations such as modifying existing effect parameters and creating new effects are not allowed.
